description: Test fixtures for the CTA Specialist workflow (cta-website-analyzer -> confirm -> cta-industry-researcher -> strategies -> select -> cta-implementation-planner)

test_cases.description: Ecommerce website selling artisan candles — tests product-focused CTA analysis with Shopify-style checkout flow and product page CTAs

confirm_cta_inventory.cta_corrections: We also have a sticky 'Add to Cart' bar on mobile product pages that wasn't captured
confirm_cta_inventory.conversion_goal: Buy a product — specifically increase product page to checkout conversion rate
confirm_cta_inventory.known_issues: Our mobile conversion rate is 40% lower than desktop. The 'Add to Cart' button blends into the background on product pages.

select_strategy.additional_input: We use Shopify and can only edit through the theme editor. No developer access. Budget is tight — prefer free or low-cost apps.

test_cases.description: SaaS website for a project management tool — tests signup/demo CTAs with freemium funnel, pricing page analysis, and lead generation focus

confirm_cta_inventory.business_corrections: We're B2B not B2C. Our primary audience is engineering teams at mid-market companies (100-1000 employees). We have a freemium tier and a 14-day trial for paid plans.
confirm_cta_inventory.cta_corrections: You missed the exit-intent popup that shows 'Start Free Trial' when users try to leave the pricing page. Also, the 'Book a Demo' CTA only shows for enterprise plan visitors.
confirm_cta_inventory.conversion_goal: Sign up for a free trial — this is our #1 growth metric
confirm_cta_inventory.known_issues: Pricing page has the highest bounce rate on the site (68%). Users seem confused between the free plan and the trial — our CTAs say different things on different pages.

select_strategy.additional_input: We built the site on Webflow and have a developer who can implement custom changes. We can use any tools. Main constraint: we can't change the pricing structure — only the CTAs and page layout.
